title: Mini Mechanical Wire and Rod Cutter Machine
description: Compact bench-top wire and rod cutter using a lever-actuated hardened shear blade for cutting copper, steel wire up to 4 mm and brass rod up to 3 mm, with adjustable length stop.
objective: Cut 4 mm copper wire and 3 mm brass rod cleanly; adjustable length stop 5–200 mm; manual lever operation with 5:1 MA; no electrical power required.
constraints: Manual lever operation; hardened tool steel blades HRC 58; BOM < ₹1500; bench-mount or handheld.
supporting_fact_titles: Wire Cutting and Insulation Stripping — Blade Mechanics
design_element_titles: Automatic Wire Cutter and Stripper Mechanism

element_usage_notes.Automatic Wire Cutter and Stripper Mecha: Shear blade variant (no insulation stripping); 5:1 lever reduces required hand force to 10 N for 4 mm copper.
